x-enumeration-literals.name: Issuer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The organization that declares and pays the dividend to its shareholders.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investor
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that owns shares and is entitled to receive dividends.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank or financial institution responsible for distributing dividend payments to shareholders on behalf of the company.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Custodian
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank or financial institution that holds shares on behalf of investors and facilitates receipt of dividends.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee dividend declarations and payments to ensure compliance with corporate and financial regulations.
